original_text: Ngày xưa, ở miền đất Lạc Việt, có một vị thần thuộc nòi rồng tên là Lạc Long Quân, sức khỏe vô địch.
translated_text: In the ancient land of Lac Viet, Lac Long Quan rose from the sea. He had a muscular human body with golden skin and wore armor made of shimmering fish scales.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Dragon lineage lord rising from the ocean waves, muscular build, golden skin, wearing shimmering fish-scale armor, majestic and powerful, 8k resolution.
subject: Dragon lineage lord

original_text: Thần dùng thanh gươm nặng để diệt trừ Ngư tinh, Hồ tinh, Mộc tinh là những loài yêu quái bấy lâu làm hại dân lành.
translated_text: He wielded a heavy sword to fight against a giant Fish Monster and a Nine-tailed Fox.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Dragon lineage lord wielding a heavy bronze sword against a giant monstrous fish and a nine-tailed fox, dramatic battle scene, dynamic movement, masterpiece quality.
subject: Dragon lineage lord,Monsters

original_text: Thần đứng dưới ruộng bùn dạy dân cách trồng trọt, chăn nuôi và cách ăn ở.
translated_text: Later, he stood knee-deep in a muddy paddy, showing villagers how to plant rice stalks.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Dragon lineage lord standing knee-deep in a muddy rice field, teaching simple villagers how to plant rice, peaceful and educational scene, rustic colors, professional artwork.
subject: Dragon lineage lord,Villagers

original_text: Bấy giờ, ở vùng núi cao phương Bắc, có nàng Âu Cơ thuộc dòng họ Thần Nông, xinh đẹp tuyệt trần, bước xuống từ màn sương.
translated_text: Au Co, a beautiful fairy, descended from the high misty mountains wearing flowing multi-colored robes.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a beautiful fairy named Mountain fairy in flowing multi-colored silk robes descending from misty mountains, ethereal light, flowers blooming at her feet, 8k resolution.
subject: Mountain fairy

original_text: Âu Cơ và Lạc Long Quân gặp nhau ở thung lũng đầy hoa, đem lòng yêu thương.
translated_text: He met Lac Long Quan in a valley full of flowers.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Lạc Long Quân and Âu Cơ meeting in a lush valley filled with wildflowers, mountains in the background, romantic and serene atmosphere, masterpiece quality.
subject: Dragon lineage lord,Mountain fairy

original_text: Họ trở thành vợ chồng, nắm tay nhau cùng về sống ở điện Long Tráng lộng lẫy.
translated_text: They held hands and walked into the Long Trang Palace, a magnificent wooden long-house decorated with coral and jade.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a magnificent ancient wooden palace decorated with coral and jade, Lạc Long Quân and Âu Cơ walking hand-in-hand towards the entrance, regal atmosphere, professional artwork.
subject: Dragon lineage lord,Mountain fairy

original_text: Ít lâu sau, trong vườn thượng uyển, Âu Cơ sinh ra một cái bọc trăm trứng phát sáng trên lá sen.
translated_text: In the palace garden, Au Co gave birth to a glowing sac of light resting on large lotus leaves.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a large glowing sac of light resting on giant green lotus leaves in a royal pond, Âu Cơ watching with wonder, mystical and magical lighting, 8k resolution.
subject: Mountain fairy,Glowing sac

original_text: Cái bọc nở ra một trăm con trai, con nào con ấy hồng hào, đẹp đẽ lạ thường.
translated_text: The sac opened, revealing one hundred eggs. Crack! The eggs hatched into one hundred strong baby boys.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a hundred eggs hatching inside a glowing sac, healthy and beautiful baby boys appearing, divine and miraculous scene, vibrant colors, masterpiece quality.
subject: Glowing sac,Baby boys

original_text: Đàn con lớn lên như thổi, mặt mũi khôi ngô, vai rộng ngực nở, khỏe mạnh như thần.
translated_text: The boys grew up quickly, standing tall with broad shoulders and bright eyes.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a group of tall, strong young men with broad shoulders and bright eyes standing together, healthy and divine appearance, ancient Lac Viet setting, professional artwork.
subject: Sons

original_text: Một hôm, Lạc Long Quân nhớ biển cả, đành từ biệt Âu Cơ đi xuống nước và biến mất.
translated_text: One day, missing the ocean, Lac Long Quan walked into the waves and disappeared.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Dragon lineage lord walking slowly into the deep blue ocean waves, turning back to look at the shore, melancholy atmosphere, sunset light, 8k resolution.
subject: Dragon lineage lord

original_text: Âu Cơ ở lại một mình ngồi trên mỏm đá, ôm ngực khóc, tháng ngày chờ mong buồn tủi.
translated_text: Au Co sat alone on a high rock by the shore, clutching her chest, tears streaming down her face as she watched the empty horizon.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Âu Cơ sitting on a high jagged rock by the sea, looking out at the horizon with tears on her face, lonely and sad mood, masterpiece quality.
subject: Mountain fairy

original_text: Không chịu nổi sự im lặng, nàng đứng dậy gọi chồng lên và than thở.
translated_text: Unable to bear the silence, she stood up and shouted towards the sea, calling his name.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Âu Cơ standing at the edge of a cliff, arms outstretched, shouting towards the vast ocean, dramatic wind blowing her robes, 8k resolution, professional artwork.
subject: Mountain fairy

original_text: Lạc Long Quân từ dưới nước hiện lên, áo giáp ướt sũng, đứng trước mặt Âu Cơ.
translated_text: Lac Long Quan emerged from the water, his armor dripping wet. He stood before Au Co.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Lạc Long Quân emerging from the waves, water dripping from his scale armor, standing on the beach before Âu Cơ, serious expression, cinematic lighting.
subject: Dragon lineage lord,Mountain fairy

original_text: Lạc Long Quân chỉ tay về phía biển và núi, nói: "Ta nòi rồng ở miền nước thẳm, nàng dòng tiên ở chốn non cao, khó ở cùng nhau."
translated_text: He pointed first to the deep blue ocean, then to the high green mountains. He said: "I am a Dragon from the deep water; you are a Fairy from the high peaks. We cannot live together."
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Lạc Long Quân pointing one hand to the sea and the other to the mountains, speaking to Âu Cơ, a symbolic divide between water and earth, masterpiece quality.
subject: Dragon lineage lord,Mountain fairy

original_text: Năm mươi người con trai mạnh mẽ theo cha đi xuống biển.
translated_text: The family divided into two groups. Fifty strong sons followed their father walking toward the crashing waves of the sea.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Lạc Long Quân leading fifty strong sons into the ocean waves, foam splashing, a grand journey beginning, 8k resolution, professional artwork.
subject: Dragon lineage lord,Sons

original_text: Năm mươi người con còn lại theo mẹ lên núi cao đầy sương mù.
translated_text: Fifty sons followed their mother climbing toward the misty forest-covered mountains.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Âu Cơ leading fifty sons up a winding mountain path into the white mist and green forests, epic landscape, masterpiece quality.
subject: Mountain fairy,Sons

original_text: Họ quay lại vẫy tay chào tạm biệt nhau, chia nhau cai quản các phương.
translated_text: They turned back and waved goodbye to each other.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, two groups of sons on a high ridge and a beach waving goodbye to each other across a distance, emotional farewell, panoramic view, 8k resolution.
subject: Brothers

original_text: Người con trưởng được tôn lên làm vua Hùng, ngồi trên ngai vàng bằng đồng ở đất Phong Châu.
translated_text: The eldest son sat on a bronze throne in Phong Chau, becoming King Hung. He wore a hat decorated with bird feathers and held a bronze spear.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, King Hung sitting on a bronze throne in the ancient capital of Phong Chau, wearing a feathered hat and holding a bronze spear, regal and ancient, masterpiece quality.
subject: Legendary Vietnamese king

original_text: Triều đình có các quan lang đứng hai bên, xung quanh đặt những chiếc trống đồng lớn.
translated_text: His court officials stood in rows wearing loincloths, with large bronze drums placed around the hall.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, an ancient royal court with rows of officials, giant bronze drums with intricate star patterns, primitive but grand atmosphere, professional artwork.
subject: Legendary Vietnamese king,Officials,Bronze Drums

original_text: Trên bầu trời, Rồng Vàng và Tiên Nữ cùng nhìn xuống bảo vệ xóm làng, ruộng đồng Việt Nam.
translated_text: High in the sky, a majestic Golden Dragon curled through the clouds, while a glowing Fairy stood on a mountain peak. They both looked down protectively at the peaceful villages and green rice fields of Vietnam below.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a golden dragon in the clouds and a fairy on a peak looking down at lush green rice fields and small villages, protective and sacred aura, 8k resolution, masterpiece quality.
subject: Dragon and Fairy
